turns.text: Hi, Bala here from Perpetuuiti Technosoft. Welcome! It's nice to meet you. I hope you're doing well today. Before we begin, could you please introduce yourself?
Nice to meet you, Mr.! Can you start by telling me a little bit about why you're interested in this role at our company?
I saw your company from, and you said in the page, you need a...

(smiling) Ah, nice to meet you! I'm Bala, the HR interviewer. You must be referring to our careers page, where we listed a role that caught your eye? What was it that interested you about our company?
He is like, can you perform?  Okay.  And I'll...

(laughs) Well, I think we got a bit of a different tone in there. Don't worry, we're not here to judge, we're here to have a conversation. So, let's start fresh. Can you tell me, what makes you think you'd be a good fit for this role?
and we have a lot of work to do.  We have a lot of work to do.  We have a lot of work to do.

(laughs warmly) Ah, I think I understand what you're trying to say! You're enthusiastic about the workload, but perhaps a bit... repetitive? Can you tell me, what do you think is the most challenging aspect of this workload, and how do you plan to tackle it?
